data.content: Implemented the Thinking Detail default-off fix for Codex paths. command_execution item.started now normalizes to an assistant tool_use block so Conversation History preserves action rows while hiding tool results when detail is off. The terminal detail filter also suppresses raw [executing] blocks and their follow-on tool output when detail is off. Added regression tests for the Codex normalizer and terminal filter. Sanity gates in /Users/cartine/foolery/work/foolery-d486: bun run lint completed with warnings only, bunx tsc --noEmit passed, bun run test passed, bun run build passed. Branch work/foolery-d486-impl-20260321 pushed with commit b2de69b9ceae.
